channel.title: Personal-assistant on Chatomics
channel.description: Recent content in Personal-assistant on Chatomics

item.title: I Built a Personal AI Assistant on a Mac Mini
item.description: My first blog post in a long time! I wanted an AI assistant that knew me. Knew my research. Knew my content calendar. Knew that when I say “write a thread about batch effects,” I mean single-cell RNA-seq batch effects with Harmony and Seurat code, for an audience of computational biologists who already know what a UMAP is. So I built Helix. An OpenClaw agent running on a Mac Mini in my home office in Boston, connected to my Google Calendar, my content docs, and a deep memory system that learns my preferences over time.
